title: CRISIS RESOLUTION - 211info
text: HELP NOW! ADVOCACY CRISIS RESOLUTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides crisis resolution through giving strategic advice and negotiating to resolve a dispute or obtain items or services for the client at no cost or reduced cost. Also assists with information and resources. Confidential Address Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 732-1911 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Alternate (541) 732-1911 Toll-free (855) 427-4737 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information. Leave a voicemail if no one is available to take the call and it will be returned the following business day. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Advocacy General Crisis Intervention Hotlines If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HELP NOW! ADVOCACY
